response.justification: Candidate is dramatically overqualified for this entry-level position. With 15+ years as a senior/staff engineer, strong software craftsmanship background, and staff-level experience, this role presents a severe career misalignment. Critical concern: German language proficiency is listed as 'basic,' but the role requires 'strong verbal and written communication in German.' Hiring this candidate would pose high retention risk due to boredom, underutilization, and compensation expectations at staff level.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across full stack, embedded systems, and cloud technologies
Proven mastery of object-oriented programming and agile methodologies with mentoring background
Excellent English communication and demonstrated ability to work in international, collaborative environments
concerns: Massively overqualified for entry-level individual contributor role; will become frustrated with scope
German language proficiency listed as 'basic' but role requires strong verbal and written German communication
Currently in career gap (caregiving); unclear availability and commitment to entry-level position after staff-level roles
